HeroSection.subtitle: Accounting, invoicing, payroll and connectivity. 100% adapted to Venezuelan regulations.

FeaturesSection.subtitle: Nine integrated modules within a single digital ecosystem built for the Venezuelan market.

features.title: VEN-NIF Accounting
features.description: Digital ledgers, RIPF, automated IVA, ISLR & IGTF filings stamped with SENIAT seal.

features.title: HR & Payroll
features.description: Payroll with SSO, FAOV, LPH, bonuses, benefits and LOPCYMAT. Full LOTTT compliance.

features.title: My Line 5G / eSIM
features.description: Physical and eSIM line provisioning, corporate fleet management, usage monitoring, and real-time telemetry.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence
features.description: Kyron AI built in. Contract drafting, tax analysis, AI-powered pitches, waste classification, and more.

features.title: Legal AI & Permits
features.description: Automated contracts, notarial powers, CONATEL and SENIAT permits, and auto-updated Official Gazette.

features.title: Ameru — Eco-Credits
features.description: AI-driven waste classification, certified eco-credit issuance, and a sustainability marketplace.

features.title: Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Live KPIs, cash-flow analysis, financial projections, and exportable PDF and PowerPoint reports.

features.title: Tax Management
features.description: IVA, ISLR, IGTF, parafiscal contributions, municipal taxes, withholdings, and an automated tax calendar.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Cryptographic sealing, an immutable audit trail, and AES-256 encryption across the entire platform.

ServicesSection.subtitle: Interconnected solutions covering accounting, invoicing, legal, telecommunications and artificial intelligence.

features.title: Accounting & Tax
features.subtitle: VEN-NIF · SENIAT · ISLR
features.description: Complete accounting system with legal books, Venezuelan chart of accounts, automatic IVA 16%, IGTF 3% and ISLR calculation. Compliant with the current Official Gazette.

features.title: AES-256 Security
features.subtitle: Military Encryption · JWT · Audit
features.description: Bank-grade security infrastructure. AES-256 encryption, JWT authentication with HTTP-only cookies, and an immutable log of every action.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence
features.subtitle: Kyron AI · Native Intelligence
features.description: Tax AI monitoring the Official Gazette, smart accounting assistant, predictive cash-flow analysis, and automatic executive report generation.

AboutUsSection.subtitle: Software engineering designed for operational excellence and full regulatory compliance.

items.question: How do you guarantee tax compliance?
items.answer: We monitor the Official Gazette with AI. IVA 16%, IGTF 3% and ISLR are calculated automatically according to current VEN-NIF regulations.

items.question: Can I manage multiple companies?
items.answer: Yes. The Partners portal lets you consolidate the accounting of multiple entities into a unified Command Center.

items.question: How does the BCV rate work?
items.answer: It updates automatically. Every invoice generates its USD equivalent with the current BCV rate.

items.question: Is it hard to migrate my data?
items.answer: No. For standard systems (Excel, Profit, Monica), migration is completed in less than 48 hours at no extra cost.

items.question: What level of security do you have?
items.answer: AES-256 encryption, JWT authentication with HTTP-only cookies, and an immutable audit log for every action.

CtaSection.subtitle: Tailored ecosystem deployment. Fill out the brief below to schedule your technical audit.
CtaSection.toast_success_desc: Dossier submitted for review. An account officer will reach out.

Footer.description: Corporate-grade software engineering. Mission-critical solutions for the future of Venezuelan finance and telecommunications.

ScrollCinematic.subtitle: Accounting, payroll, invoicing, 5G and much more — built for Venezuela, with integrated AI and automated tax compliance.

highlights.label: My Line 5G
highlights.desc: 5G eSIM provisioning, corporate mobile fleet management and high-performance connectivity.

highlights.label: Integrated AI
highlights.desc: Kyron AI next-generation assistant. Automates reports, documents and analysis.

highlights.label: AES-256 Security
highlights.desc: Bank-grade encryption, HTTP-only JWT and immutable audit of every operation.

highlights.label: HR & Payroll
highlights.desc: Full LOTTT management: payroll, benefits, vacations and severance in one click.

highlights.label: Fiscal Invoicing
highlights.desc: Invoices and credit/debit notes with IGTF validation and automatic BCV rate.
